01 — About
Who I Am

I'm Dev Sisodiya — a developer and creator from Udaipur, Rajasthan. I build for the web, craft interactive UI/UX experiences, and explore game development with Unreal Engine.

With a Diploma in IT and real-world internship experience at Scaler, I blend clean code with creative problem solving. I've shipped everything from college admin systems to real-estate app prototypes and horror game mechanics published on the Fab marketplace.

Currently deep into AI agent building, prompt engineering, vibe-coding, and building large scalable models. Always learning. Always shipping.

Leave Management System
Full-featured leave tracking system for a college admin panel. Role-based access for Faculty, HOD, and Principal. Salary auto-adjusted based on leave count.

Bala-ji Bulk Bazaar
Responsive wholesale business website with clean layout, product showcase and contact details. Delivered to exact client brief — one-page, fast, mobile-ready.

Reel Estate — Find App
Interactive real-estate app where users scroll properties like reels. Like, Call, Live Chat, Post Properties, ID Verification login, Filters, Anti-fraud system. Mobile-first UX prototype.
